goal: Relink the restored 169-card collection / 170-card source to the actual historical card art files already present under public/assets/cards so the card showcase uses each card's dedicated artwork again instead of falling back due to extension mismatches.
constraints: Do not change the restored 170-card source records unless absolutely necessary.
Prefer fixing the card art resolution layer over editing showcase UI components.
Use the actual physical asset inventory and repository history as the source of truth for extension and alias mapping.
Do not modify unrelated story, menu, or community files.
deliverables: Update src/utils/assets.ts so getCardImageUrl resolves to the correct historical physical art files for the restored 170-card source.
Add a short audit note documenting the recovered mapping basis and the extension-mismatch root cause.
Record any durable card-art lookup convention if confirmed.
